name: Wing Loading Calculator
description: Calculate wing loading based on aircraft weight and wing area.
formulaDescription: Wing loading is the amount of weight supported per unit area of wing.

example.explanation: A 6000 N weight over 16.2 m² wing area results in a wing loading of about 370 N/m².

faqs.question: Why is wing loading important?
faqs.answer: Wing loading affects takeoff distance, stall speed, and maneuverability.
